summary: Produce Web and Windows distributable evidence
acceptance_criteria: A local Web build and unsigned Windows Electron smoke package can launch the M5 slice and pass deterministic host hash/security canaries.
Electron renderer keeps nodeIntegration=false, contextIsolation=true, sandbox=true, strict preload/IPC schema validation, and no arbitrary channel/path/shell-open exposure.

Web save/import/export and Electron save adapter behavior are smoke-tested without direct renderer filesystem access and without adding accounts, network services, telemetry, or release-store integration.
Distributable evidence remains local/smoke-only: no commercial release, branding, store presence, installer signing, telemetry, paid services, accounts, or public release decision is made.
required_tests: Windows package smoke launches the M5 slice and verifies save/import/export boundaries plus host hash/security canary results.

release_engineer.responsibility: primary release_engineer writer for M5 Web and unsigned Windows distributable smoke evidence

notes: This proves distributability only; it is not a release, commercial, store, branding, signing, telemetry, or account task.
Do not weaken Electron security settings or add arbitrary IPC to make smoke tests pass.
Lead started release_engineer writer thread 019f0508-95e6-76c2-92dd-d3cbb7311085 (Courier the 10th) after M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 closure entered main.
